gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review found no bugs, regressions, or security issues; it confirmed the guard rejects top-level response payloads while keeping root status records and compact get --summary wrappers accepted.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_databricks_runs.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
what_changed: Rejected raw Databricks Jobs API responses in release-bundle run-status sidecars.
Preserved support for compact root status records and databricks_runs get --summary wrappers while refusing top-level response payloads.
Added a regression test with a token-bearing fake response and documented that --include-response is not release-bundle safe.
why: Release bundles need successful Databricks job provenance without accidentally archiving task parameters or workspace metadata from raw Jobs API responses.
